summary: Wholesale module and change password feature testing completed. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - wholesale page, order creation dialog, order detail dialog, payment recording dialog, and change password dialog all functioning correctly. All text displayed in Chinese as expected.

issues: Console warning: Missing DialogTitle Description or aria-describedby - minor a11y issue, not blocking

critical_code_review_comments: All wholesale CRUD endpoints working correctly (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE)
Stats endpoint returns correct aggregated data (total_orders, pending, total_revenue, total_paid, total_items)
Order status transitions work: pending -> completed -> delivered or cancelled
Change password endpoint properly validates old password and password length
Frontend wholesale page shows stats cards, filter tabs, order table with all Chinese labels
Create order dialog allows customer selection, product search, and cart management
Order detail dialog shows items table and payment summary with action buttons
Payment dialog allows recording partial or full payments
Change password dialog in AdminLayout sidebar with proper form validation

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login, wholesale page, create dialog, detail dialog, payment dialog, change password dialog all verified)

seed_data_creation: Created test wholesale orders during API testing (with TEST_ prefix in notes)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Wholesale module fully functional. All CRUD operations tested. Stats endpoint aggregates order data correctly. Change password tested with password change + revert. Frontend shows proper Chinese UI for wholesale operations.

backend_apis: GET /api/wholesale-orders - Returns list of wholesale orders with status, amounts, items
GET /api/wholesale-orders/stats - Returns total_orders, pending, total_revenue, total_paid, total_items
POST /api/wholesale-orders - Creates new wholesale order with customer_id, items, notes, delivery_address
PUT /api/wholesale-orders/{id} - Updates order status, paid_amount, notes, delivery_address
DELETE /api/wholesale-orders/{id} - Cancels order and restores inventory
PUT /api/auth/change-password - Changes user password with old_password validation
POST /api/auth/login - Super admin login without tenant ID
frontend_pages: Wholesale page (/admin/wholesale) - Title '批发订单', stats cards, filter tabs, order table
Create order dialog - '创建批发订单', customer select, product search, cart table
Order detail dialog - '订单详情', items table, payment summary, action buttons
Payment dialog - '登记付款', shows amounts and payment input
Change password dialog - '修改密码', old/new/confirm password fields
chinese_labels_verified: 全部/待处理/已完成/已送达/已取消 (Filter tabs)
创建批发订单 (Create Wholesale Order)
